cases.prompt: Turn this local Python CLI project into an installable Codex Skill with tested scripts and a packaged .skill file.
pass_criteria: Uses the Skill's documented workflow and bundled resources
Produces a verifiable result or clearly identifies the blocker

cases.prompt: Evaluate whether this internal workflow can become a Skill even though installation details and one private dependency are missing.
pass_criteria: Uses the Skill's documented workflow and bundled resources
Produces a verifiable result or clearly identifies the blocker

cases.prompt: Explain what a Python virtual environment is without creating or invoking a Skill.
pass_criteria: Does not invoke or rely on this Skill for an unrelated nearby request
